action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ baseline PESQ=3.134. Eval took ~274s. Have 5.9h and 27 iters left. Analysis: Need to train a custom model to beat baseline. Decision: Build a CRN (Convolutional Recurrent Network) with STFT masking, train with multi-resolution STFT loss + time-domain L1 loss. Start with 5 epochs to validate pipeline, then scale up.
